subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Though the effulgent manifestations of the Ancient Beauty in the hallowed Vale of the blessed Spot shine even as the rays of the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی هر چند تجلیات جمال قدم در وادی ایمن بقعه مبارکه چون شعاع شمس
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @light and darkness
